rulings.Case Title: CATHEDRAL HILL TOWER CONDOMINIUM ASSOCIATION INC VS. HAI LE ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Renewed Motion For Preliminary Injunction
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 28, 2019 line 3. PLAINTIFF CATHEDRAL HILL TOWER CONDOMINIUM ASSOCIATION INC Notice Of Motion And Renewed Motion For Preliminary Injunction is GRANTED. There is a likelihood Plaintiff will prevail on the merits, and the interim harm suffered by Plaintiff outweighs the harms suffer by Defendant by the granting of the preliminary injunction. =(501/CFH)
